title: Intensely Garlicky Norwegian Black Pudding Skewers
description: A festive and flavorful Norwegian dish featuring black pudding, perfect for a lacto-vegetarian friendly gathering, with a crispy exterior and intensely garlicky flavor
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, around 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, salt, black pepper, and thyme.
Add the sliced black pudding to the bowl and toss to coat with the garlic mixture.
Thread the marinated black pudding pieces onto the soaked vegetable skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking and grill the skewers for 5-7 minutes per side, or until crispy and slightly charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and squeeze with lemon juice.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
Let the skewers cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
